sprints.name: AI Chatbot Revenue Engine
sprints.rationale: Fastest path to visible client value and upsell potential. No dependencies.

items.title: Client AI: Full dashboard context
items.notes: Feed audit, strategy, ranks, content pipeline, approvals, activity, annotations into chatbot

items.title: Client AI: Global knowledge base
items.notes: Per-workspace knowledgeBase field + knowledge-docs/ folder, injected into both chatbots

items.title: Client AI: Sales engine behavior
items.notes: 8 revenue hooks, Insights Engine branding, warm handoff pattern

items.title: Admin AI chat panel
items.notes: /api/admin-chat endpoint + AdminChat.tsx with internal analyst persona

items.title: Admin GA4 dashboard upgrade
items.notes: Sparklines, period comparison, organic, new vs returning, conversions

items.title: Workspace Home Dashboard
items.notes: Per-workspace landing page with parallel-fetched audit/search/GA4/ranks/requests/activity data

items.title: Audit pipeline: error sort + flag + Fix→ + auto-fix
items.notes: Pages sorted by errors, Flag for Client workflow, Fix→ routes to tools with auto-generation context (Schema auto-generates, Editor auto-expands, Briefs pre-fill)

items.title: Sidebar restructure + Command Center
items.notes: Icon-only bottom bar, Command Center button, grouped nav (Analytics, Site Health, SEO, Manage)

sprints.name: Stripe Payments & Auth Foundation
sprints.rationale: Monetize content deliverables and establish user identity. Revenue + infrastructure.

items.title: Stripe integration: content payments
items.notes: Accept payments for content briefs, full blog posts, and keyword strategies. Stripe Checkout or Payment Links, webhook for fulfillment status, payment tracking per workspace

items.title: Internal user accounts
items.notes: User model, bcrypt, JWT/sessions, login by email, req.user on all routes

items.title: Workspace access control
items.notes: Restrict workspaces by user, role-based middleware

items.title: Client user accounts
items.notes: Individual client logins, client_admin/member roles, team management UI

sprints.name: Data Quality & Dashboard Polish
sprints.rationale: Clean up recently shipped work, extend to client side.

items.title: Admin Search Console: primitives audit
items.notes: Shipped — new panels verified against shared UI primitives

items.title: Client dashboard: simplified search data
items.notes: Traffic growth direction, top pages (plain language), device split

items.title: Admin GA4 dashboard upgrade
items.notes: Shipped in Sprint 1

items.title: Client dashboard: simplified analytics data
items.notes: Simplified GA4 organic overview for client portal

sprints.name: Intelligence Upgrades
sprints.rationale: Cross-pollinate data across tools for smarter recommendations.

items.title: SEO Audit Intelligence
items.notes: Cross-reference audit findings with GSC/GA4 performance data

items.title: Content brief enrichment
items.notes: Shipped — GSC queries + SEMRush volume/KD/CPC/related keywords injected into AI brief generation

items.title: Monthly report enrichment
items.notes: Period comparison data in auto-generated report narratives

items.title: AI chatbot: conversation memory
items.notes: Session history, cross-session summaries, client preferences

items.title: Internal team management
items.notes: Invite, manage, assign workspaces, disable accounts

items.title: Permission-based feature access
items.notes: Fine-grained: client_member view-only on approvals

items.title: AI chatbot: proactive insights
items.notes: Auto-surface 2-3 contextual insights on dashboard load

items.title: Custom date range picker
items.notes: Replace preset buttons with full calendar selector

items.title: Notification preferences
items.notes: Per-user email settings, digest frequency, in-app bell

items.title: Content calendar
items.notes: Visual calendar of content in production with due dates

sprints.name: Backlog
sprints.rationale: Revisit quarterly. Do when a specific need justifies it.

items.title: AI chatbot: multi-modal responses
items.notes: Inline charts, data tables, export

items.title: Writer assignment
items.notes: Assign content to specific writers

items.title: Multi-competitor analysis
items.notes: Compare against 2-3 competitors simultaneously

items.title: Client onboarding wizard
items.notes: Guided first-time experience for new clients

items.title: Webhook / Zapier triggers
items.notes: Fire webhooks on key events

items.title: White-label domain support
items.notes: CNAME + reverse proxy for client portals

items.title: ROI calculator / value dashboard
items.notes: Show dollar value of organic traffic

items.title: Automated competitive monitoring
items.notes: Monthly competitor audit, alert on improvements

items.title: "What happened this month" summary
items.notes: Auto-generated plain-English monthly summary

items.title: Content performance tracker
items.notes: Track GSC/GA4 performance per published post

items.title: Shared notes / wiki per workspace
items.notes: Team-internal notes about a client

items.title: AI anomaly detection
items.notes: Background job to flag traffic/conversion anomalies

items.title: Client NPS survey
items.notes: Periodic in-dashboard satisfaction survey

items.title: Content delivery attachments
items.notes: Shipped — delivery URL + notes fields on content requests, PATCH endpoint for fulfillment

items.title: GSC 404 import for redirect scanner
items.notes: Pull crawl errors from GSC to seed redirect scanner

items.title: Audit historical trend charts
items.notes: Track audit score over time per-page, not just site-wide

items.title: Schema auto-schedule
items.notes: Re-generate schemas on cadence, flag stale pages

items.title: Competitor historical comparisons
items.notes: Track competitor gap over time

items.title: Competitor keyword overlap
items.notes: Show shared keywords and where you win/lose

items.title: Historical redirect comparison
items.notes: Track redirect status over time, detect new 404s

items.title: Full-site PageSpeed scan
items.notes: Multi-page PSI scan as background job

items.title: Accessibility audit expansion
items.notes: WCAG contrast, ARIA, heading order, form labels

items.title: WCAG AA full compliance
items.notes: Focus indicators, keyboard nav for all interactive elements

items.title: GSC: URL Inspection API
items.notes: Per-URL indexing status, crawl info

items.title: GA4: Exit pages + attribution
items.notes: Advanced analytics

items.title: Webflow Enterprise API: 301 redirects
items.notes: Push rules via API (Enterprise-only)

items.title: Sales report: branded PDF export
items.notes: Downloadable prospect reports with agency branding

items.title: Sales report: email delivery
items.notes: Send reports directly to prospects

items.title: Concurrent background job limits
items.notes: Prevent duplicate audits on same site

items.title: Heavy dependency audit / tree-shaking
items.notes: Verify Lucide tree-shaking, audit chart libs

items.title: Responsive mobile layout
items.notes: Sidebar → bottom nav, stacked cards on small screens
